summary: Interactive Globe app with UI refactoring in progress. Moving time controls (time button + Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles) from bottom-right panel to below Terminator/Twilight Zone controls in the left panel. Using a 3-step atomic approach due to large file size limitations.
architectural_notes: InteractiveGlobe.tsx is very large and exceeds token/context limits when modified directly — use small atomic changes
Time controls are being extracted to TimeControls.tsx to allow small, focused changes
known_issues: Repeated build failures when modifying InteractiveGlobe.tsx directly due to file size

existing_features.title: Create a new standalone React component file `frontend/src/components/TimeControls.tsx` that encapsulates the time button (the button that opens/toggles the time picker or time mode) and the Real/Hourly/Yearly toggle controls. The component must accept all necessary state values and handler callbacks as props (e.g., timeMode, onTimeModeChange, currentTime, onTimeChange, or equivalent props mirroring what is currently used in InteractiveGlobe.tsx). The component must render identically to the existing controls in the bottom-right panel. Do NOT modify `InteractiveGlobe.tsx` in this step.

new_feature_requests.summary: Extract time controls into standalone TimeControls.tsx component (Step 1)
Render TimeControls in both bottom-right panel and below Terminator/Twilight Zone controls (Step 2)
Remove time controls from bottom-right panel after confirming new location works (Step 3)
